## Runtime.RuntimeProcedure.create() method

Factory method for creating a RuntimeProcedure.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static create(context: IProcedureContext, id: ProcedureId, procedure: Procedure | IProcedure): Result<RuntimeProcedure>;
```
